---
name: "\U0001F4E2 Takedown request (lecturers / rights holders)"
about: Request removal of your material from this repository
title: "[Takedown] <course code> — <material>"
labels: takedown
---

**Which files/folders should be removed?**
(Links or paths, e.g. `SUSTech/MA337 Real Analysis (H)/…`)

**Your relationship to the material**
(e.g. lecturer of the course, publisher, author)

**Anything else I should know?**

---
*Takedown requests are honored promptly. Per the repository license note, all prior downloads of the removed material are no longer authorized.*
